texto: Story Content Warning: There will be angst, sex, a little rough language and rampant lesbianism. If this is not your cup of tea, don't drink it. If you are not old enough to read this, you will be soon. It might be in your best interest to wait until you are older. If you live in a place where this is not legal... why are you still living there? Maybe it's time for you to move on.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de BadSquirrel que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Story Content Warning: There will be angst, sex, a little rough language and rampant lesbianism. …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, funny, irony, com foco em humor e irony.

texto: I am not going to give you disclaimers about what you can expect to find in my story. I went through menopause recently and find I don't much care about anyone's sensibilities anymore. I am called BadSquirrel for a reason. Considering how incredibly rude and grouchy I have become, I expect all of you to be extremely grateful to the QMBG (Queen Mother Bitch Goddess for those of you who haven't kept up) for all of the good warm fuzzy bits of my story. If you like it, it's because she went through it and took out all the really disturbing parts and made me behave.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a BadSquirrel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I am not going to give you disclaimers about what you can expect to find in my story. I went thro…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, funny, irony pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e irony.

Considering how incredibly rude and grouchy I have become, I expect all of you to be extremely grateful to the QMBG (Queen Mother Bitch Goddess for those of you who haven't kept up) for all of the good warm fuzzy bits of my story.
